qa_pair.question: What is the total number of Ultravox calls currently tracked in Voxray?
Which error type has the highest number of occurrences across all analyzed calls?
How many calls have been analyzed by Claude Haiku in total?
What is the current error rate across all analyzed calls (as a percentage)?
Which agent has the most calls with critical errors — Sales AI, Debt Collector, or Cold Outreach?
How many occurrences of no_save_answers have been detected, and how many of those are critical severity?
What error type is unique to the Debt Collector agent (appears only in Debt Collector calls, not Sales AI or Cold Outreach)?
What is the total cost in USD for all Ultravox calls tracked in Voxray?
What is the average call duration in seconds across all calls that have a duration greater than zero?
Using voxray_get_agent_summary, which agent has the highest error rate percentage among Sales AI, Debt Collector, and Cold Outreach?
